name: copilot-launch-minted-from-name
description: #47 D2/D3 mode (a): a Copilot CLI compat-layer launch payload (Task matcher -> Agent tool, snake_case) yields a `dispatched` record whose subject is the shop-MINTED id carried verbatim in tool_input.name, with subject_basis=minted-id. Provenance: DESIGN-MANDATED - the landed base producer (df4fb95) exits 0 silently at the subagent_type launch filter (`if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($subagentType)) { exit 0 }`, scripts/Produce-Artifact.ps1), writing no record, because the compat launch payload carries tool_input.agent_type, not tool_input.subagent_type - so it never reaches the tool_response.agentId read; this vector lands red-first and drives the D4 adapter seam. Copilot launch keyset OBSERVED and quoted in the superseded design docs/design/2026-07-24-dual-runtime-harness-design.md section 3b item 8 (cwd, hook_event_name, session_id, timestamp, tool_input{name,agent_type}, tool_name Agent, tool_result). The probe-log capture the shape was measured from (.claude/probe-logs/post-task.jsonl) is gitignored runtime output and is not in the tree; section 3b-8 is the landed fossil of that measurement.

tool_result.text_result_for_llm: Agent started in background with agent_id: 47-car-r1
